object.description: Indicates this is a list response.
Distinguishes the authorized connect application object.

id.description: The unique ID of the authorized connect application.

granted_scopes.description: The scopes granted by the user to the application.

oauth_resource.description: The OAuth resource associated with the authorized connect application, if one was requested.

id.description: The unique ID of the connect application.

client_id.description: The client ID of the connect application.

description.description: A description of the connect application.
description.example: An application for managing user access

name.description: The name of the connect application.

scopes.description: The scopes available for this application.

uri.description: The redirect URI for the application.

default.description: Whether this is the default redirect URI.

redirect_uris.description: The redirect URIs configured for this application.

uses_pkce.description: Whether the application uses PKCE for authorization.

is_first_party.description: Whether the application is a first-party application.
Whether the application is a first-party application.

was_dynamically_registered.description: Whether the application was dynamically registered.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the application belongs to.

is_first_party.description: Whether the application is a first-party application.

was_dynamically_registered.description: Whether the application was dynamically registered.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the application belongs to.

data.description: The list of records for the current page.

before.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the start of the list.

after.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the end of the list.

list_metadata.description: Pagination cursors for navigating between pages of results.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
A human-readable description of the error.
